title: Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises:
Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises!
